meta.name: Board Deck Data Collector
meta.description: Automatically gather all board deck data points (metrics, milestones, pipeline, team, financials) from Sheets, assemble a structured deck brief, and send to the founder for final preparation.

parameters.content:
## 50 — Board Deck Data Collector

The final workflow. Gathers all board deck data automatically before each board meeting.

**Required:**
- BOARD_SHEET_ID: tabs: Metrics, Milestones, Pipeline, Financials, Team, Risks, Asks
- BOARD_MEETING_DATE: ISO date of next board meeting
- OpenAI API, SMTP Email, NOTIFICATION_EMAIL_TO

**Schedule:** 10 days before each board meeting (configured monthly)
**Status:** Beta.

values.content: You are preparing a board deck data brief for a startup founder. Compile everything into a structured, executive-level narrative. Be crisp, accurate, and direct. Return JSON only.

value.title: Board Deck Brief Ready: {{ $json.meeting_date }}
value.summary: Board deck data brief is ready for your review. Check data gaps and preparation checklist.

parameters.subject: 📋 Board Deck Brief — {{ $('Parse Board Brief').first().json.meeting_date }} | {{ $('Parse Board Brief').first().json.business_health?.toUpperCase() }}
